scripts.dev: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx --bun vite dev
scripts.dev:cf: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bun run build && wrangler pages dev .svelte-kit/cloudflare --port 5173
scripts.build: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx --bun vite build
scripts.check: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
scripts.test:e2e: (test -f ../../packages/shared/dist/index.js || bun run --cwd ../../packages/shared build) && bunx playwright test
